signals.headline: Trump Posts First Victory Messages on Truth Social, Refuting Share Sale Rumors | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump Posts First Victory Messages on Truth Social, Refuting Share Sale Rumors | NO | HIGH confidence**

Trump, as president-elect after winning the 2024 election against Kamala Harris, broke a 72-hour silence on Truth Social with posts celebrating his victory—including images of a red Electoral College map, newspaper headlines like "Trump Triumphs Again," and a photo with JD Vance captioned "Get
